top_signals.title: FTSE 100 Live: Stocks set for tug of war amid US-Iran mixed messages
top_signals.summary: Good morning and welcome back to the City AM liveblog. Markets are being pulled in countless directions from the conflicting information emerging around the conflict in the Middle East. The FTSE 100 managed to shrug off some of these jitters yesterday and secure a finish 0.3 per cent higher as the price of oil slipped. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Oil climbs as U.S., Iran trade strikes while Trump says negotiations with Tehran underway
top_signals.summary: U.S. Central Command said Tuesday that it had defeated multiple Iranian ballistic missiles following "attempted attacks" by Iran.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Demand for Australia Seven-Year Debt Climbs as RBA Signals Pause
top_signals.summary: A gauge of demand for Australian government bonds due in seven years surged at auction Wednesday as investors increasingly bet the Reserve Bank’s tightening cycle is nearing an end.

top_signals.title: Coinbase invests in Ethena via open market purchase of ENA, flags new partnership
top_signals.summary: Ethena said the two companies have also become partners "to grow onchain finance and savings products."
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Alleged Kimwolf Botmaster ‘Dort’ Arrested, Charged in U.S. and Canada
top_signals.summary: Canadian authorities on Wednesday arrested a 23-year-old Ottawa man on suspicion of building and operating Kimwolf, a fast spreading Internet-of-Things botnet that enslaved millions of devices for use in a series of massive distributed denial-of-service (DDoS) attacks over the past six months. KrebsOnSecurity publicly named the suspect in February 2026 after the accused launched a volley of DDoS, doxing and swatting campaigns against this author and a security researcher. He now faces criminal hacking charges in both Canada and the United States.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
